skills.name: Shadow Thorn
skills.description: Sharp thorns rise from within the shadow of an enemy, dealing damage. Applies [Blind] to enemies for 3 seconds when hit. Shadow Thorn cannot be blocked or evaded.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Ignores 10% defense of enemies under [Blind] debuff

skills.name: Shadow Conjuration
skills.description: Spread the shadow lengthwise to the front and attack those on the shadow.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Targets: CaptionRatio
Increases damage against enemies under [Blind] by 30%

skills.name: Shadow Pool
skills.description: Drift into the shadows and hide within the ground. Enemies cannot attack you while in this state.

skills.name: Hallucination
skills.description: Summon a shadow that looks exactly like you to take damage in your place.
skills.effect_text:
Shadow HP Percentage: CaptionRatio %
Duration: 15 seconds

skills.name: Shadow Condensation
skills.description: Draw shadows of your allies and enemies and compress them into orbs. The enemies who have had their shadows drawn are afflicted with [Blind] and the orb explodes after 3 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x maximum 5
Target: CaptionRatio
[Blind] Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Shadow Fetter
skills.description: Nail the shadow of enemies to the ground to prevent them from moving and make them into a state of shadow erosion.
skills.effect_text:
Immobility Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Shadow Erosion Duration: CaptionRatio seconds
Target: 10

skills.name: Infernal Shadow
skills.description: Separates an enemy from their shadow. Attack the shadow by Shadowmancer skills in proportion to the damage dealt by the caster.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Damage ratio: CaptionRatio %

attributes.name: Shadow Thorn: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Shadow Thorn] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Shadow Conjuration: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Shadow Conjuration] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Shadow Condensation: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Shadow Condensation] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Shadow Thorn: Stepping Shadows
attributes.description:
* Applies [Shadow Thorn] as 2 hits on ground monsters

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Shadow Conjuration: Shadow Trap
attributes.description:
* Ground enemies hit by [Shadow Conjuration] are afflicted with [Shadow Trap] for 2 seconds per attribute level

* [Shadow Trap] applies Dark damage every 0.5 seconds to affected enemies

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Shadow Pool: Movement Speed
attributes.description:
* Increases movement speed by 2 per attribute level while [Shadow Pool] is active

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Hallucination: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the HP ratio of [Hallucination]'s shadow by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Infernal Shadow: Drain Vitality
attributes.description:
* Upon using [Infernal Shadow], gain 50% of the enemy's maximum HP as a shield, and decrease the HP of the created shadow by 50%

* The damage absorbed by the shield cannot exceed the caster's maximum HP

attributes.name: [Arts] Shadow Thorn: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Shadow Thorn] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Shadow Conjuration: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Shadow Conjuration] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Shadow Condensation: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Shadow Condensation] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Shadow Pool: Darkness Armor
attributes.description:
* Invincibility function deleted

* Skill level* lasts for 1 second

* Decreases damage received from the enemy

* Only Shadowmancer skill can be used

* Increases SP consumption by 100%
